phases.name: Kickoff & Intake Scoping
activities: Align project stakeholders on objectives and exclusions
Setup secure shared directory for documentation sharing

phases.name: Architecture & Privilege Boundary Audit
activities: Perform read-only code review of agent orchestrations
Map agent database and API scopes
Audit network egress and VPC configurations

phases.name: Threat Modeling & Security Vulnerability Assessment
activities: Conduct prompt injection and boundary breakout testing (sandboxed)
Audit insecure output parsing and direct tool call limits
Evaluate logging mechanisms for tamper-evident validation

phases.name: NIST 800-53 Control Mapping & Gap Analysis
activities: Evaluate findings against NIST 800-53 families (AC, AU, SC)
Compile Gap Ledger with severity ratings and compliance scoring

phases.name: Final Delivery & Executive Readout
activities: Deliver finalized Executive Summary Report and detailed files
Establish follow-up scoping for ConMon monthly support subscription
outputs: Final project sign-off and feedback collection
